시편 136:1.content: Give thanks to Yahweh, for he is good; for his loving kindness endures forever.

시편 136:2.content: Give thanks to the God of gods; for his loving kindness endures forever.

시편 136:3.content: Give thanks to the Lord of lords; for his loving kindness endures forever:

시편 136:4.content: to him who alone does great wonders; for his loving kindness endures forever:

시편 136:5.content: to him who by understanding made the heavens; for his loving kindness endures forever:

시편 136:6.content: to him who spread out the earth above the waters; for his loving kindness endures forever:

시편 136:7.content: to him who made the great lights; for his loving kindness endures forever:

시편 136:8.content: the sun to rule by day; for his loving kindness endures forever;

시편 136:9.content: the moon and stars to rule by night; for his loving kindness endures forever:

시편 136:10.content: to him who struck down the Egyptian firstborn; for his loving kindness endures forever;

시편 136:11.content: and brought out Israel from among them; for his loving kindness endures forever;

시편 136:12.content: with a strong hand, and with an outstretched arm; for his loving kindness endures forever:

시편 136:13.content: to him who divided the Red Sea apart; for his loving kindness endures forever;

시편 136:14.content: and made Israel to pass through the middle of it; for his loving kindness endures forever;

시편 136:15.content: but overthrew Pharaoh and his army in the Red Sea; for his loving kindness endures forever:

시편 136:16.content: to him who led his people through the wilderness; for his loving kindness endures forever:

시편 136:17.content: to him who struck great kings; for his loving kindness endures forever;

시편 136:18.content: and killed mighty kings; for his loving kindness endures forever:

시편 136:19.content: Sihon king of the Amorites; for his loving kindness endures forever;

시편 136:20.content: Og king of Bashan; for his loving kindness endures forever;

시편 136:21.content: and gave their land as an inheritance; for his loving kindness endures forever;

시편 136:22.content: even a heritage to Israel his servant; for his loving kindness endures forever:

시편 136:23.content: who remembered us in our low estate; for his loving kindness endures forever;

시편 136:24.content: and has delivered us from our adversaries; for his loving kindness endures forever:

시편 136:25.content: who gives food to every creature; for his loving kindness endures forever.

시편 136:26.content: Oh give thanks to the God of heaven; for his loving kindness endures forever.
